items.name_cn:
🆕 M82392
Made of Monogram Unplant leather featuring a stamped Monogram pattern, this "Portomone Rozari" is a small wallet with a circular flap decorated with a button snap. The interior features a flat pocket, a zipper coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
Size:11 8 2.5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M82206
Exclusive edition of the 'Zippy Wallet' for the 'Gradient' collection this season. Featuring a high-end gradient on soft, embossed Monogram Unplant leather in summer tones. A signature wallet characterized by a slender silhouette. A zip opening with a cleverly designed interior featuring multiple card slots, pockets, and compartments.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M82348
A "Portefeuille Victorine" for the "Gradient" collection. Reinterpreted with a beautiful gradient in Monogram Unplant leather featuring summer tones. Despite its compact size, it features multiple pockets and 6 card slots, making the surprisingly large interior a charm. A gold button with the "Louis Vuitton" signature on the decorative flap adds a touch of color.
Dimensions: 12 9.5 1.5

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14164 】This passport case is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue series, starting a fun journey with the artist's panda image. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13992 White】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This zippy wallet is made of monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m12961】This victorine wallet is a true collector's item from the exclusive 57th Street New York series, starring the brand's iconic mascot Vivienne. Made from iconic monogram coated canvas, it features a fun pattern that captures the vibrant New York lifestyle. The compact design offers smart organization, including a zip pocket for coins and six card slots. 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14092 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series key pouch is made of monogram coated canvas and features playful rainbow tones, inspired by the passionate and lively aesthetics of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The key pouch has clean lines and can easily fit into a handbag or pocket. It has an internal hook to hold six keys and is securely fastened with a gold snap button. 12 x 7 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13409 White Multicolor】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zip coin purse features a timeless design that blends practical functionality with playful style, adding vitality to the season. The coin purse is made of monogram coated canvas and features joyful rainbow tones, paying tribute to Takashi Murakami's iconic vivid color style. The coin purse has a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
